faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in Clifton, NJ?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination in Clifton typically costs between $350-$600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, ensuring transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: What does your rat extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive rat extermination service includes a thorough inspection, strategic bait station placement, trap installation, entry point identification and sealing, removal of contaminated insulation if necessary, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination. faqs.question: Are rat extermination treatments safe for my family and pets in Clifton?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We take extra precautions in homes with children and animals, strategically placing bait stations in secure, tamper-resistant containers and clearly communicating any necessary safety measures during treatment.
